calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-16-19 At 10:50 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apperances:
Ken H. Yee, Respondent/Plaintiff, In Pro Per
Jian Feng Li, Appellant/Defendant, In Pro Per

Cantonese Interpreter Connie Chen (ID #700103)
Mandarin Interpreter Agnes Chang (ID #301206)

This cause comes on calendar this day for small claims appeal.
The parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.
Appellant Jian Feng Li testifies in Mandarin, assisted by an interpreter.
Respondent Ken H. Yee testifies in Cantonese, assisted by an interpreter.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Evidence is retained.

Judge Andrew Y.S. Chneg, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (606)
